category_sources: Official Scarb docs at https://docs.swmansion.com/scarb describe Scarb for Cairo and Starknet projects.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://docs.swmansion.com/scarb uses Scarb.
docs_sources: Official docs index at docs.swmansion.com/scarb provides Scarb documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Scarb documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/software-mansion/scarb, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Cairo package manager.
source_facts.executables lists scarb, scarb-doc, scarb-cairo-test, and scarb-cairo-language-server.
